1957 - The Brothers Rico - Los hermanos Rico - Phil Karlson - VOSE
The Brothers Rico (1957)
sources.description: Eddie Rico, the erstwhile bookkeeper for a big Mafia boss, is now making a living as an honest merchant in Florida with his family. Things go sour when the police start a search for his syndicate-linked brothers who are on the lam after a big hit, forcing Eddie to get involved with the Mafia again. Watch on RetroFlix.org:  https://retroflix.org/the-brothers-rico-1957/

sources.title: The Brothers Rico [1957] - A short clip by Martin Scorsese
sources.description: This is a short three-and-a-half minute clip. It is Martin Scorsese talking about the film.  The Brothers Rico is a 1957 American Film Noir directed by Phil Karlson and starring Richard Conte, Dianne Foster and Kathryn Grant. You can view the film here .

sources.title: The Brothers Rico [1957] Dir. Phil Karlson Starring Richard Conte, Dianne Foster, Kathryn Grant
sources.description: The Brothers Rico is a 1957 American Film Noir directed by Phil Karlson and starring Richard Conte, Dianne Foster and Kathryn Grant. You can find out more about this movie from Wikipedia and Film Nolr of the Week . You can see a short clip of Martin Scorsese talking about the film here . It can be viewed as an introduction to the film without spoiling the plot.

sources.title: The Brothers Rico (restored, with intro and outro) (1957, film noir, imdb score: 6.8)
sources.description: The Brothers Rico is a 1957 American crime film noir directed by Phil Karlson and starring Richard Conte , Dianne Foster and Kathryn Grant .

metadata.Plot: Eddie Rico, the erstwhile bookkeeper for a big Mafia boss, is now making a living as an honest merchant in Florida with his family. Things go sour when the police start a search for his syndicate-linked brothers who are on the lam after a big hit, forcing Eddie to get involved with the Mafia again.
metadata.Writer: Lewis Meltzer, Ben Perry, Georges Simenon
metadata.Actors: Richard Conte, Dianne Foster, Kathryn Grant
